calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Vaheh Manoukian, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff on court call; Anthony Booth, Esq. appearing for defendant on court call. Defendant requested that the court dismiss the case for failure of plaintiff to bring the case to trial within 5 years. The matter was argued. After argument, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
